mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_tool_invocations ( session_id, step_name, tool_name, request_json, response_json, status, error_code, error_message, latency_ms, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{stepName}, #{toolName}, #{requestJson}, #{responseJson}, #{status}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{latencyMs}, #{createdBy}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()) )
